Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}What're you waitin' for? Finish me off![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Why are you so devoted to him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Takaya showed me the light when I was in the darkness...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I forget how many years it's been...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It was before I knew about the Dark Hour, or havin' the potential, or any of that...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}The Kirijo Group rounded up orphans from all over, and tried to awaken Personas in them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}But, when a Persona doesn't emerge naturally, it's difficult to control.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}So, the kids had to take these experimental drugs so their Personas wouldn't kill them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Only three kids out of the original hundred survived, and after six months, the experiment was canceled.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}So you've all suffered at the hands of the Kirijo Group as well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Takaya saved me from it all... I'll never forget what he told me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}"Don't be bound by the past, and don't look to the future. Simply live in the moment."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Honestly, I don't even give a damn about Kirijo anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}But... I'm gonna... fulfill... Takaya's wish... no matter what...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}We're running out of time! Everyone, head up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Heh, that's right. I don't need your pity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}No hesitation. If we don't defeat Nyx, then this was all for nothing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Look at these ugly clowns, crawlin' up in droves...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Heh... You're not eatin' me... I ain't goin' out on your terms...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}I believe in you, Takaya... Fulfill our wish...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}I will hold on to the freedom you gave me to the very end...![n]{f 1 1}
